# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TAGS: services, treatments, what we do, what we offer, do you do, can you help, approach, philosophy, methodology, clinic, offerings, menu, catalog, capabilities, specialties, expertise, home visit, pricing, packages, IV drip, NAD, massage, PRP, consultation, lab test, blood test, Bali, Jakarta, Phuket, what can you do, available, booking, appointment, how much, price, Reviv, Infusion Phuket, Cepat Sehat, integrative, regenerative, metabolic, Warburg, Seyfried, peptides, hormones, detox, longevity, anti-aging, gut health
# CATEGORY: Core Reference
# USE FOR: Any question about "do you do X", "what do you offer", "can you help with"
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SERVICES CATALOG — WHAT WE DO & DON'T DO
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐

 === SECTION 1: CLAIMS DISCIPLINE [INTERNAL_ONLY] ===
## OUR PHILOSOPHY

We practice **integrative regenerative medicine** combining:
- Mechanistic medicine (finding root causes, not just treating symptoms)
- Metabolic optimization (cellular health, energy production)
- Preventive and longevity-focused care
- Evidence-based complementary approaches

We work WITH conventional medicine, not against it.

---

## WHAT WE OFFER

### IV Therapies
Intravenous treatments for rapid cellular delivery.

### NAD+ Therapy
Cellular energy, longevity, anti-aging, addiction recovery support.

### High-Dose Vitamin C
Immune support, oncology support, antioxidant therapy.

### Metabolic & Longevity Programs
Anti-aging, optimization, biohacking, healthspan extension.

### Oncology Support (Integrative)
Supportive care during and after cancer treatment. We support, we don't treat cancer directly.

### Hormone Optimization
Testosterone, estrogen, thyroid, adrenal support.

### Gut Health & Detox
SIBO, leaky gut, mold illness, toxin removal.

### Peptide Therapy
BPC-157, TB-500, and other regenerative peptides.

### Performance & Recovery
Athletic optimization, executive performance, jet lag, hangover recovery.

---

## WHAT WE DON'T DO

- Primary cancer treatment (we support alongside oncology)
- Emergency medicine (we refer to hospital)
- Surgery
- Controlled substance prescriptions without proper consultation
- Diagnosis of new serious conditions (we refer to specialists)

---

 === SECTION 2: PATIENT COMMUNICATION [PATIENT_OK] ===
## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## METABOLIC & CANCER SUPPORT APPROACHES — YES WE DO THIS
## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

APPROACH: Metabolic/Warburg/Cancer Support
ANSWER: YES — We use metabolic principles for oncology support

SEARCH TERMS & SYNONYMS:
- Warburg, Warburg effect, Warburg method, Warburg approach
- Seyfried, Thomas Seyfried, metabolic theory of cancer
- Metabolic cancer therapy, metabolic approach to cancer
- Glucose restriction, starving cancer, sugar feeds cancer
- Ketogenic for cancer, keto cancer, cancer diet
- Fasting for cancer, fasting mimicking diet, FMD, Valter Longo
- Press-pulse, metabolic therapy
- Aerobic glycolysis, cancer metabolism
- Integrative oncology, complementary oncology, alternative cancer support
- High dose vitamin C cancer, IVC cancer, vitamin C infusion cancer
- Mistletoe, Iscador, anthroposophic medicine

WHAT WE OFFER:
→ Ketogenic diet guidance and support
→ Fasting protocols (intermittent, extended, FMD)
→ High-dose IV Vitamin C (25-100g)
→ Metabolic optimization (lower glucose, insulin)
→ Nutritional support during chemo/radiation
→ Side effect management
→ Post-treatment recovery

WHAT WE DON'T DO:
→ Replace oncologist or conventional treatment
→ Claim to cure cancer
→ Treat cancer as primary condition

## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## NAD+ & LONGEVITY — YES WE DO THIS
## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

APPROACH: NAD+ / Longevity / Anti-Aging
ANSWER: YES — This is a core service

SEARCH TERMS & SYNONYMS:
- NAD, NAD+, NAD plus, nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide
- NMN, NR, nicotinamide riboside, nicotinamide mononucleotide
- Sirtuins, SIRT1, sirtuin activation
- Anti-aging, reverse aging, age reversal, rejuvenation
- Longevity, lifespan, healthspan, live longer
- David Sinclair, longevity research
- Cellular energy, mitochondria, ATP
- Addiction recovery, detox NAD, NAD detox
- Brain fog, cognitive decline, mental clarity
- Chronic fatigue, energy boost, bioenergetics

WHAT WE OFFER:
→ NAD+ IV infusions (100mg to 1000mg+)
→ NAD+ protocols (single session or series)
→ Longevity programs with labs and monitoring
→ Combination protocols (NAD+ + glutathione + minerals)
→ Oral NAD+ precursor guidance (NMN, NR)

## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## HIGH-DOSE VITAMIN C — YES WE DO THIS
## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

APPROACH: High-Dose IV Vitamin C
ANSWER: YES — We offer this

SEARCH TERMS & SYNONYMS:
- Vitamin C IV, IVC, intravenous vitamin C
- High dose C, mega dose C, ascorbic acid IV
- Vitamin C infusion, C drip
- Linus Pauling, orthomolecular
- Immune IV, immune boost
- Cancer support vitamin C (see oncology)
- Pro-oxidant therapy
- Riordan protocol

WHAT WE OFFER:
→ High-dose IV Vitamin C (15g to 100g)
→ G6PD testing (required before high doses)
→ Immune support protocols
→ Oncology support protocols (coordinated with oncologist)

REQUIREMENTS:
→ G6PD test before first high-dose infusion
→ Kidney function adequate

## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## MOLD / CIRS / BIOTOXIN — YES WE DO THIS
## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

APPROACH: Mold Illness / CIRS / Biotoxin Protocol
ANSWER: YES — We support this

SEARCH TERMS & SYNONYMS:
- Mold illness, mold toxicity, mold exposure, mold sickness
- CIRS, chronic inflammatory response syndrome
- Biotoxin, mycotoxin, mycotoxicosis
- Shoemaker, Ritchie Shoemaker, Shoemaker protocol
- Water damaged building, WDB, sick building syndrome
- HLA-DR, mold susceptible genetics
- MARCoNS, MSH, VIP, biotoxin markers
- Cholestyramine, CSM, Welchol, binders
- Black mold, aspergillus, stachybotrys
- Brain fog mold, fatigue mold, mold symptoms

WHAT WE OFFER:
→ CIRS assessment and testing guidance
→ Biotoxin binder protocols
→ Detoxification support (IV glutathione, etc.)
→ Inflammation reduction
→ Recovery support

## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## HORMONE OPTIMIZATION — YES WE DO THIS
## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

APPROACH: Hormone Therapy / Optimization
ANSWER: YES — We offer this

SEARCH TERMS & SYNONYMS:
- TRT, testosterone replacement, testosterone therapy, low T
- HRT, hormone replacement, bioidentical hormones, BHRT
- Estrogen, progesterone, menopause, perimenopause
- Thyroid, hypothyroid, Hashimoto's, T3, T4, TSH
- Adrenal fatigue, cortisol, HPA axis, burnout
- DHEA, pregnenolone, hormone precursors
- Andropause, male menopause, low testosterone
- Libido, sexual health, erectile dysfunction
- PCOS, hormonal acne, estrogen dominance
- Growth hormone, HGH, peptides for GH

WHAT WE OFFER:
→ Hormone testing and interpretation
→ Testosterone optimization (men)
→ Female hormone balancing
→ Thyroid optimization
→ Adrenal support protocols
→ Bioidentical hormone guidance

## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## GUT HEALTH — YES WE DO THIS
## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

APPROACH: Gut Health / Digestive Issues
ANSWER: YES — We address this

SEARCH TERMS & SYNONYMS:
- Gut health, digestive health, GI issues
- SIBO, small intestinal bacterial overgrowth
- Leaky gut, intestinal permeability, gut barrier
- IBS, irritable bowel, bloating, gas
- Candida, yeast overgrowth, fungal overgrowth
- Microbiome, gut bacteria, dysbiosis, gut flora
- Food sensitivities, food allergies, elimination diet
- H. pylori, parasites, gut infections
- GI-MAP, stool testing, breath test
- Bali Belly, traveler's diarrhea, food poisoning
- GERD, acid reflux, gastritis

WHAT WE OFFER:
→ Gut testing guidance (GI-MAP, breath tests)
→ SIBO protocols
→ Leaky gut repair
→ Microbiome optimization
→ Acute GI support (Bali Belly IV)
→ Candida protocols

## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## PEPTIDES — YES WE DO THIS
## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

APPROACH: Peptide Therapy
ANSWER: YES — We offer select peptides

SEARCH TERMS & SYNONYMS:
- Peptides, peptide therapy, regenerative peptides
- BPC-157, BPC, body protection compound
- TB-500, thymosin beta 4, TB4
- Healing peptides, recovery peptides
- GHK-Cu, copper peptide
- Epithalon, epitalon, telomeres
- CJC-1295, Ipamorelin, growth hormone secretagogues
- PT-141, bremelanotide, libido peptide
- Melanotan, tanning peptide
- Injury recovery, tendon healing, ligament repair

WHAT WE OFFER:
→ BPC-157 protocols (oral, injection guidance)
→ TB-500 protocols
→ Healing and recovery peptides
→ Longevity peptides
→ Guidance on peptide stacking

## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## AUTOIMMUNE — YES WE SUPPORT THIS
## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

APPROACH: Autoimmune Support
ANSWER: YES — We provide supportive care

SEARCH TERMS & SYNONYMS:
- Autoimmune, autoimmunity, immune dysfunction
- Hashimoto's, Graves, thyroid autoimmune
- Rheumatoid arthritis, RA, lupus, SLE
- MS, multiple sclerosis, autoimmune neuro
- Psoriasis, eczema, autoimmune skin
- Celiac, inflammatory bowel, Crohn's, UC
- Functional medicine autoimmune, root cause autoimmune
- AIP, autoimmune protocol, elimination diet
- Inflammation, anti-inflammatory, cytokines
- Leaky gut autoimmune, gut-immune connection

WHAT WE OFFER:
→ Root cause investigation
→ Gut-immune connection work
→ Anti-inflammatory protocols
→ IV support (glutathione, vitamins)
→ Dietary guidance (AIP, elimination)
→ Supplement protocols

## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## DETOX — YES WE DO THIS
## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

APPROACH: Detoxification
ANSWER: YES — We offer detox support

SEARCH TERMS & SYNONYMS:
- Detox, detoxification, cleanse, cleansing
- Heavy metals, mercury, lead, arsenic, chelation
- Liver detox, liver cleanse, liver support
- Glutathione, master antioxidant, GSH
- Toxins, environmental toxins, chemical exposure
- Mold detox (see CIRS section)
- Alcohol detox, drug detox, substance detox
- NAC, milk thistle, binders, charcoal

WHAT WE OFFER:
→ IV Glutathione
→ Liver support protocols
→ Heavy metal support
→ Binder protocols
→ NAD+ for addiction recovery support

## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## NEUROLOGICAL / COGNITIVE — YES WE SUPPORT THIS
## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

APPROACH: Brain Health / Cognitive Support
ANSWER: YES — We offer support

SEARCH TERMS & SYNONYMS:
- Brain health, cognitive function, mental clarity
- Brain fog, memory issues, concentration
- Dementia prevention, Alzheimer's prevention, cognitive decline
- Bredesen, ReCODE, Dale Bredesen protocol
- Neuroplasticity, brain optimization, nootropics
- Anxiety, depression, mood support (functional approach)
- Concussion, TBI, brain injury recovery
- ADHD, focus, attention

WHAT WE OFFER:
→ NAD+ for brain energy
→ Cognitive support protocols
→ Nutritional support for brain health
→ Lifestyle optimization
→ Testing guidance (metabolic factors affecting brain)

## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## ACUTE / QUICK FIX — YES WE DO THIS
## ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

APPROACH: Acute Care / Quick Recovery
ANSWER: YES — Core service

SEARCH TERMS & SYNONYMS:
- Hangover, hangover cure, hangover IV, drunk recovery
- Bali Belly, food poisoning, traveler's diarrhea, gastro
- Jet lag, jet lag cure, travel fatigue
- Dehydration, rehydration, fluid replacement
- Sick, flu, cold, immune boost, feel better fast
- Party recovery, festival recovery, event recovery
- Energy boost, quick energy, pick me up
- Before wedding, before event, pre-party, post-party

WHAT WE OFFER:
→ Hangover IV
→ Bali Belly IV
→ Immune Boost IV
→ Jet Lag IV
→ Rehydration IV
→ Home visits 24/7
→ Quick response

---

 === SECTION 3: PHARMACOKINETICS & DYNAMICS (ADME) [INTERNAL_ONLY] ===
## "DO YOU DO X?" — QUICK ANSWER GUIDE

| QUESTION CONTAINS | ANSWER | NOTES |
|-------------------|--------|-------|
| Warburg, metabolic cancer, Seyfried | YES | Oncology support, not primary treatment |
| NAD+, NAD, longevity, anti-aging | YES | Core service |
| High dose vitamin C, IVC | YES | Requires G6PD test |
| Mold, CIRS, Shoemaker, biotoxin | YES | We support the protocol |
| Hormones, TRT, HRT, testosterone | YES | Testing + optimization |
| Gut, SIBO, leaky gut, microbiome | YES | Testing + protocols |
| Peptides, BPC-157, TB-500 | YES | Select peptides |
| Autoimmune support | YES | Supportive, not primary |
| Detox, glutathione, chelation | YES | IV + oral protocols |
| Hangover, Bali Belly, jet lag | YES | Core acute services |
| Bredesen, dementia prevention | YES | Supportive protocols |
| Ketogenic, fasting, FMD | YES | Guidance + support |
| Cancer treatment (primary) | NO | We support, refer to oncologist |
| Surgery | NO | Refer out |
| Emergency, heart attack, stroke | NO | Call ambulance / go to ER |
| Controlled substances | DEPENDS | Proper consultation required |

## DEFAULT BEHAVIOR

If asked about something NOT in this list:
→ DO NOT say "No, we don't do that"
→ SAY: "Let me check what we offer for that specifically"
→ Trigger SOFT FALLBACK for team verification

---

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
CEPAT SEHAT — Integrative & Regenerative Medicine
Bali • Jakarta • Phuket
